title: Vaadi En Karutha Pulla Song Lyrics Athangudi Ilayaraja
stanzas:
Vaadi En Karutha Pulla Song Lyrics Athangudi Ilayaraja Album
#AthangudiIlayaraja

Adi vaadi en karutha pulla
rendu naalaaga
urakkam valla (2)

adi allipola thalli
naan vandhaporathalli
un padhila sollitu podi (2)

Adi vaadi en karutha pulla
rendu naalaaga
urakkam valla

naan paatteduthu paadi
vaaren themmaangu paatu
nee ilaiyaraja paatta
kaelu adhirudhu vaettu (2)

yaaru thunaiyumilla enakku
yaarum nigarumalla

udumbu udambu pulla
enaiya jayikka
evanum illa

modhi paaru adi paadi
nee poata poati podu
enakkaaga oru koottam
ada melam kotti
aattam podum.

vaadi , adi vaadi.
Adi vaadi en karutha pulla
rendu naalaaga
urakkam valla

Adi genda meenu
kannu rendum
ilukkudhu enna.
un palvarisa muthusaram
mayakkuvadhenna.(2)

urunjum udhatulaye
ennaiye irukki
mudinji putta

sangu kaluthulathaan
ennaiyum vadhachi
vaattiputta

adi sittu thanga pattu
en pakkam illadi
onnu thaaren udhattaale
nee vetkam vittu
kattipudi

vaadi adi vaadi
Adi vaadi en karutha pulla
rendu naalaaga
urakkam valla

en aththa peththa
rathiname machchaana paaru
en maamaa veettu
maththalame aadharavu kooru.

unna vittaa yaarum illa
enakku ottikida
vaadi pulla

kannasaikkum nerathula
enakku kadhal thee
moottu pulla.

idha therinju konjam
purinju indha
machchaan solla kaelu

indha ulagam ulla
varaikkum nee
ennodathaan otti vazha.

vaadi en karutha pulla
rendu naalaaga
urakkam valla

adi vaadi en karutha pulla
rendu naalaaga
urakkam valla

adi allipola thalli
naan vandhaporathalli
un padhila sollitu podi

adi vaadi vaadi vaadi
en karutha pulla

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions related to love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic relationships.

In which movie does this song appear?

The movie context is currently unknown, but it is part of the album by Athangudi Ilayaraja.

Who is the singer and lyricist of the song?

The song is sung and written by Athangudi Ilayaraja.

When was the song released?

The song was released on September 23, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vaadi En Karutha Pulla, the listener is taken on an emotional journey through the lens of love and longing. The song beautifully conveys the feelings of yearning and nostalgia, making it a perfect fit for moments of reflection. Athangudi Ilayaraja's soulful rendition adds depth to the lyrics, evoking a sense of melancholy that resonates with many. This track is a heartfelt expression of romance that lingers in the mind long after it ends.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaadi En Karutha Pulla is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of longing and love. With Athangudi Ilayaraja pouring his heart into the lyrics and vocals, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet pangs of romance. Dive into the soulful world of this track and let its enchanting vibe sweep you away.
stanzaMeanings: Hey, my dark child, it's been two days since you slept well.
Like a flower thrown away, I came here to tell you something.
Hey, my dark child, it's been two days since you slept well.
I will sing and perform, listen to the song by Ilayaraja, it's amazing.
I have no one to support me, no one at all.
No one can defeat me, I am strong.
Look at the way, sing and dance for me, gather a group and play music.
Hey, hey. Hey, my dark child, it's been two days since you slept well.
Hey, the fish in the water, what is it to you? What is your sweet talk?
I am stuck in a situation, I can't escape.
The conch shell is calling, it has trapped me.
Hey, don't just sit there, give me something, don't be shy.
Hey, hey. Hey, my dark child, it's been two days since you slept well.
Look at my aunt's precious gem, my uncle's house is the foundation.
If you leave me, I will have no one, hey child.
In the moment of love, I feel the fire burning.
Understand this a bit, listen to what I say.
In this world, until the end, you are the one who supports me.
Hey, my dark child, it's been two days since you slept well.
Hey, my dark child, it's been two days since you slept well.
Like a flower thrown away, I came here to tell you something.
Hey, hey, hey, my dark child.
